title: Fix NFT minting persistence and collection display

requirements.text: Fix the NFT minting process to ensure minted NFTs are properly stored in the backend canister with complete metadata including token ID, owner Principal, provenance data, ORIGYN metadata, and image blob references

quotes: I need all NFTs to mint for real. I need their images and information to persist in our canister.

acceptanceCriteria: NFT metadata is stored in backend state immediately after minting
Image blobs are stored in the canister's blob storage
Owner Principal is correctly associated with the minted NFT
Provenance data persists across canister upgrades
mintNFT function returns the complete NFT record including token ID

requirements.text: Ensure getUserNFTs backend function returns all NFTs owned by the requesting user with complete metadata and image blob references

quotes: the NFT does not show in my collection

acceptanceCriteria: getUserNFTs query returns array of all NFTs where owner matches caller Principal
Each returned NFT includes token ID, metadata, provenance, and image blob ID
Function works correctly after page refresh or re-authentication
Empty array is returned for users with no NFTs (not an error)

requirements.text: Fix the user collection view in UserDashboard to properly fetch and display all minted NFTs with their images and full metadata information

quotes: I need them to be viewable, images AND information, in a user's collection if they are holding that NFT.

acceptanceCriteria: Collection view fetches NFTs using useUserNFTs query hook
Each NFT card displays the uploaded image using the blob URL
NFT metadata is visible including name, description, and provenance details
Collection updates immediately after successful mint without requiring page refresh
Images load correctly from canister blob storage
Loading states and error handling are implemented

requirements.text: Verify that the mint flow in AdminDashboard correctly uploads images to backend blob storage and receives confirmation of successful NFT creation before showing success message

quotes: the mint process succeeds with all of the provenance info filled out, however the NFT does not show in my collection

acceptanceCriteria: Image upload completes and returns blob ID before NFT minting
Mint function waits for backend confirmation before invalidating queries
Success message only shows after NFT is confirmed stored in backend
React Query cache is properly invalidated to trigger collection refetch
Error handling catches and displays any storage failures

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not change the ORIGYN metadata structure already implemented
Maintain existing blob storage architecture using ExternalBlob pattern
nonGoals: Adding new NFT metadata fields not already in the schema
Changing the visual design of the collection view
Implementing batch minting fixes (focus on single mint flow)
Modifying authentication or access control logic
